heroHeadline: RSF Drones Strike Al-Jabalain Hospital Killing 10 (7 Medical Staff); SAF Repels Dalang Assault; Command Reshuffle
heroSubtitle: RSF launched two drone strikes on Al-Jabalain Hospital in SAF-controlled White Nile State on April 3, hitting the operating theater and maternity ward during an immunization campaign and killing 10 including 7 medical staff; separately, SAF repelled a major multi-front RSF assault on Dalang in the Nuba Mountains (South Kordofan) on April 2 as tribal tensions within RSF ranks weakened cohesion; Gen. Burhan reshuffled top SAF command with Gen. Atta appointed as new chief of staff; multi-front pressure from RSF-SPLM-N continues across South Kordofan and Blue Nile as Sudan's 2026 humanitarian plan remains only 16% funded
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, UNHCR, WFP, OHCHR, WHO, ACLED, HRW, Radio Dabanga, Sudan Tribune, Reuters, Al Jazeera, MSF, Darfur24, AFP, Anadolu Agency, The National, UN News, UN Security Council, IOM, Washington Post, MadaMasr, Xinhua
